message:
security: fix path traversal, info disclosure, and NaN handling

Critical fixes:
- Add path traversal protection in lib/mdx.ts with slug validation
  and resolved path verification to prevent directory escape attacks
- Fix invalid date handling in isDataStale() - NaN dates now correctly
  return true (stale) instead of false

Security hardening:
- og-image route: Don't leak upstream status codes (use generic 502)
- og-image route: Add MAX_IMAGE_SIZE (5MB) to reject oversized images
- og-image route: Improve cache cleanup to remove oldest entries first
- github-heartbeat: Sanitize error responses to avoid leaking
  upstream status codes (except 429 for rate limiting)

Robustness improvements:
- parseStarCount: Handle NaN from parseFloat, return 0 as safe default
- isValidStargazerIntelligence: Add NaN checks and validate first
  array element structure for better runtime safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
